name: telos-merkle-dag
description: TELOS Merkle-DAG planning, Ed25519 verified delegation, and a pure done() merge gate.

scripts.check: node --check vendor.mjs && node --check scripts/test-vendor.mjs && node --check merkle.mjs && node --check scripts/test-merkle.mjs && node --check artifact.mjs && node --check crypto.mjs && node --check scripts/test-artifact.mjs && node --check scripts/test-crypto.mjs && node --check ledger-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/test-ledger-gate.mjs && node --check orchestrate.mjs && node --check scripts/test-orchestrate.mjs && node --check test-harness.mjs && node --check planner.mjs && node --check scripts/test-planner.mjs && node --check obligation.mjs && node --check scripts/test-obligation.mjs && node --check proposal-ledger.mjs && node --check scripts/test-proposal-ledger.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-vendor.mjs && node scripts/test-merkle.mjs && node scripts/test-artifact.mjs && node scripts/test-crypto.mjs && node scripts/test-ledger-gate.mjs && node scripts/test-orchestrate.mjs && node test-harness.mjs && node scripts/test-planner.mjs && node scripts/test-obligation.mjs && node scripts/test-proposal-ledger.mjs
